title: Whats up with Fuyutsukis voice It sounds really different from what I remember
display_title: Whats up with Fuyutsukis voice It sounds really different from what I remember
wikitext:
[]: What's up with Fuyutsuki's voice? It sounds really different from what I remember             Quote Post by khronos » Fri Aug 13, 2021 9:22 pm Has anybody noticed how different his voice is in this latest movie or is it just me? He's still voiced by the same VA (he's 86 years old )

[]: Re: What's up with Fuyutsuki's voice? It sounds really different from what I remember             Quote Post by Gendo's Glasses » Fri Aug 13, 2021 11:08 pm He's the 'controversial' Fuyutsuki from the End of Evangelion dub.

[]: Re: What's up with Fuyutsuki's voice? It sounds really different from what I remember             Quote Post by khronos » Sat Aug 14, 2021 5:12 am Gendo's Glasses wrote: He's the 'controversial' Fuyutsuki from the End of Evangelion dub.

[]: Re: What's up with Fuyutsuki's voice? It sounds really different from what I remember             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Mon Aug 16, 2021 10:33 am khronos wrote: Has anybody noticed how different his voice is in this latest movie or is it just me? He's still voiced by the same VA (he's 86 years old )

[]: Re: What's up with Fuyutsuki's voice? It sounds really different from what I remember             Quote Post by Szmitten » Mon Aug 16, 2021 10:53 am I had an Evangelion TV rewatch while some Shin voicework was dripping out and frankly everybody sounds 25 years older.

[]: Re: What's up with Fuyutsuki's voice? It sounds really different from what I remember             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Aug 16, 2021 11:52 am Fuyutsuki says one of his lines twice in the dub - as in they've accidentally used two different takes. 1:04:35 - "All the vessels of the Adams are ready...The reactivation of Unit 13 is only a matter of time (said boldly).....The reactivation of Unit 13 is only a matter of time (said more wistfully)". There's more and more screw-ups and odd decisions appearing the dub. This one is nearly as bad as the famous "Let me do that one again..." line from Oblivion.

[]: Re: What's up with Fuyutsuki's voice? It sounds really different from what I remember             Quote Post by Archer » Mon Aug 16, 2021 11:57 am Jayfive wrote: Fuyutsuki says one of his lines twice in the dub - as in they've accidentally used two different takes. 1:04:35 - "All the vessels of the Adams are ready...The reactivation of Unit 13 is only a matter of time (said boldly).....The reactivation of Unit 13 is only a matter of time (said more wistfully)". There's more and more screw-ups and odd decisions appearing the dub. This one is nearly as bad as the famous "Let me do that one again..." line from Oblivion.

[]: Re: What's up with Fuyutsuki's voice? It sounds really different from what I remember             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Aug 16, 2021 12:02 pm It's only said once in the original.

[]: Re: What's up with Fuyutsuki's voice? It sounds really different from what I remember             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Aug 16, 2021 12:17 pm khronos wrote: Has anybody noticed how different his voice is in this latest movie or is it just me? He's still voiced by the same VA (he's 86 years old )
